Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.3 'TOKEN=$\(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{\\""username\\"":\\""admin\\"",\\""password\\"":\\""nethelper\\""}"" | python3 -c ""import sys,json; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)[\\""access_token\\""]\)""\) && echo ""TOKEN OK"" && curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/sites/"" | python3 -m json.tool | head -20 && curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/conflicts/pending-count"" | python3 -m json.tool')

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.3 'TOKEN=$\(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{\\""username\\"":\\""admin\\"",\\""password\\"":\\""nethelper\\""}"" | python3 -c ""import sys,json; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)[\\""access_token\\""]\)""\) && curl -s -X POST ""http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/sites/"" -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{\\""name\\"":\\""Sede Principale\\"",\\""description\\"":\\""Data center principale\\"",\\""address\\"":\\""Via Roma 1, Milano\\""}"" | python3 -m json.tool')
